name: Alchip Technologies, Limited
summary: Alchip Technologies, Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides silicon design and manufacturing solutions for application specific integrated circuit and System on chip (SoC) companies. It offers SoC design, production, and IP solutions, as well as multi project wafer services. The company's products are primarily used in network, storage, and computing devices; HDTVs, mobile phones, digital cameras/video cameras, entertainment systems, portable media players, tablet PC master chips, and peripheral chips; and surveillance systems, entertainment machines, and medical equipment and instruments. It operates in China, Japan, the United States, Taiwan, Europe, and internationally. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
